annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under Alaska Stat. 09.30.070(a), currently 6.75% (as of January 1, 2026). Three (3) percentage points above the 12th Federal Reserve District discount rate in effect on January 2 of the year in which the judgment or decree is entered. The 12th FRD… Simple interest. A judgment founded on a written contract that specifies an interest rate (not exceeding the legal maximum) bears the contract rate if that rate is… Verify the current value at public.courts.alaska.gov; not legal advice.
